ebike_system.pedal_assist: Five levels of pedal-assist and an ergonomic thumb throttle deliver the speed and power to own the road as a Class 1, 2, or 3 eBike.**
ebike_system.thumb_throttle: An ergonomic below-the-bar trigger throttle on the left hand side is easily engaged with your thumb while simultaneously eliminating joint fatigue.

color_lcd_display.details: A backlit, heads-up color LCD display with a USB-A port provides trip and battery intelligence on the go. IP-65 rated electrical components ensure greater water and dust resistance

motor_controller.details: 24 amp controller is IP-65 rated and potted for weather proofing and thermal management

motor.details: A Sutto rear hub-motor  with of delivers power and speed quicker than ever before. New Stealth M24 technology is 400% quieter*, delivering a hushed motor experience without sacrificing power

battery.details: Available with a Long-Range lithium-ion battery certified to UL 2271 to power your ride for up to 60 miles, respectively.†‡ The ONE is also certified to UL 2849

ebike_system.lectric_pwr: Lectric's Pedal Assist Wattage Regulation (PWR) programming allows for an improved Pedal Assist experience by assisting the rider up to a certain power level for each PAS setting, instead of limiting the assistance by speed alone. Learn more about PWR here.
ebike_system.pas_sensor: Lectric's PWR™ allows the rider to control the eBike's output with no additional effort so that a torque sensor is not necessary for smooth rides. Instead, the Lectric ONE has a simply designed and affordable cadence sensor with 96 magnets simulated so you can reach high speeds with ease.
ebike_system.charging: An external charging port provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The Lectric ONE comes standard with a 2amp charger for 5-7 hour charging.

special_features.pinion_smart_shift_app: All gearbox functions are combined in the Pinion Smart.Shift App, which can be easily paired and customized to suit your preferences. A pre-select feature automatically sets the rider's gears, allowing effortless auto-shifts, while a convenient start-select feature lets riders dictate their starting gear ahead of time, allowing for split-second starts.
special_features.gates_carbon_drive_app: The Gates app is used to measure belt tension sonically. The belt can be plucked like a guitar string while the app uses the microphone on a mobile device to read the vibration frequency and compares it to a chart to determine if any adjustments are needed.

safety.safety_lights: An integrated safety system, featuring a headlamp and a brake-activated taillight powered by the battery allows you to be seen at any time of day.

certifications.safety_certified: The Lectric ONE is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the ONE's lithium-ion battery is certified to UL 2271.

front_fork.details: This rigid fork is fully aluminum and ultra lightweight, featuring a thru axle dropout

frameset.frame: 6000-series-aluminum frame is sturdy yet lightweight. The chainstays feature vertical dropouts and speciality designed splits on each side for easy access to the belt drive.

drivetrain.pinion_gearbox: With the Pinion C1.6i six-speed sealed weatherproof gearbox, shifting is done at the touch of a button – quickly, ergonomically, and intuitively. The system shifts while riding, while stationary, and while under load.
drivetrain.belt_drive: Gates CDC 113-tooth Carbon Drive Belt System is lightweight and carbon fiber-reinforced. The belt’s performance is nearly maintenance-free while providing a chainless drivetrain that’s clean, quiet, smooth, and strong.
drivetrain.belt_cogs: A Gates CDC 24-tooth steel rear belt cog is paired with an aluminum CDX 39-tooth front cog providing a ratio-optimized performance to accommodate a wide range of speeds.
drivetrain.removable_pedals: Quick-release pedals easily detach from the bike for compact transport.

brakes.details: Hydraulic mineral oil brakes and rotors (1.8mm thick) offer ultimate stopping power and peace of mind in wet or dry conditions

city_tires.details: '' city tires featuring a reflective strip are equipped with 3mm Hippo Skin with an Aramid Floc Breaker. Shark Skin Protection on the sidewall offers pinch flat protection and all-weather reliability. Slime is installed to prevent flat tires at no additional cost

wheelset.thru_axle: The front wheel features a Thru Axle wheel attachment system for tool-free installation. This feature ensures a straight wheel, consistent brake rotor alignment, and handling stability. Remove the wheel in minutes for an easy and light-weight transport.

cockpit.telescoping_seat_post: An adjustable and removable seat post allows riders to reach a range of heights while maintaining comfort and stability.
cockpit.adjustable_handlebar_stem: Easily adjustable handlebar stem riser includes a quick-release lever to comfortably adjust your handlebar reach to your liking; bring your handlebars toward you or push them further back.
cockpit.lock_on_grips: Ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.
cockpit.saddle: A custom-designed saddle compliments a sportier look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.

geometry.payload_capacity: Max: 330 lbs. Never exceed the payload capacity. Distribute weight within the guidelines: Max Rider weight 330 lbs, Max Front Rack Weight 20 lbs, Max Rear Rack Weight 30 lbs.

included_accessories.kickstand: A heavy-duty side-sweeping kickstand located near the chain stay keeps the eBike upright.
included_accessories.accessory_mounting_points: The frame features multiple mounting points throughout the eBike for various accessory combinations.

general_other.hidden_cable_routing: The down tube of the frame houses the main cables for a premium experience at no extra cost.
general_other.green_packaging: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.
general_other.one_minute_tool_free_assembly: Simply attach the quick-release pedals, unfold the handlebar stem, and install the front wheel via the thru axle.

geometry.payload_capacity: Max: 330 lbs. Never exceed the payload capacity. Distribute weight within the guidelines: Max Rider weight 330 lbs, Max Front Rack Weight 20 lbs, Max Rear Rack Weight 30 lbs.

free_accessories.name: Safety Lights
free_accessories.detail: An integrated safety system, featuring a headlamp and a brake-activated taillight powered by the battery allows you to be seen at any time of day.

physical.Pedal-Assist: Five levels of pedal-assist and an ergonomic thumb throttle deliver the speed and power to own the road as a Class 1, 2, or 3 eBike.**
physical.Color LCD Display: A backlit, heads-up color LCD display with a USB-A port provides trip and battery intelligence on the go. IP-65 rated electrical components ensure greater water and dust resistance.
physical.Bike Weight: Total bike weight is 48lbs with the 7lb battery removed.
physical.City Tires: 20x2.5'' city tires featuring a reflective strip are equipped with 3mm Hippo Skin with an Aramid Floc Breaker. Shark Skin Protection on the sidewall offers pinch flat protection and all-weather reliability. Slime is installed to prevent flat tires at no additional cost.
physical.Front Fork: This rigid fork is fully aluminum and ultra lightweight, featuring a thru axle dropout.
physical.Thru Axle: The front wheel features a Thru Axle wheel attachment system for tool-free installation. This feature ensures a straight wheel, consistent brake rotor alignment, and handling stability. Remove the wheel in minutes for an easy and light-weight transport.
physical.Pinion Gearbox: With the Pinion C1.6i six-speed sealed weatherproof gearbox, shifting is done at the touch of a button – quickly, ergonomically, and intuitively. The system shifts while riding, while stationary, and while under load.
physical.Cranks: Pinion aluminum cranks are 165mm in length.
physical.Belt Drive: Gates CDC 113-tooth Carbon Drive Belt System is lightweight and carbon fiber-reinforced. The belt’s performance is nearly maintenance-free while providing a chainless drivetrain that’s clean, quiet, smooth, and strong.
physical.Belt Cogs: A Gates CDC 24-tooth steel rear belt cog is paired with an aluminum CDX 39-tooth front cog providing a ratio-optimized performance to accommodate a wide range of speeds.
physical.Brakes: Hydraulic mineral oil brakes and 180mm rotors (1.8mm thick) offer ultimate stopping power and peace of mind in wet or dry conditions.
physical.Lectric PWR™: Lectric's Pedal Assist Wattage Regulation (PWR) programming allows for an improved Pedal Assist experience by assisting the rider up to a certain power level for each PAS setting, instead of limiting the assistance by speed alone. Learn more about PWR here.
physical.Safety Lights: An integrated safety system, featuring a headlamp and a brake-activated taillight powered by the battery allows you to be seen at any time of day.
physical.Telescoping Seat Post: An adjustable and removable seat post allows riders to reach a range of heights while maintaining comfort and stability.
physical.Adjustable Handlebar Stem: Easily adjustable handlebar stem riser includes a quick-release lever to comfortably adjust your handlebar reach to your liking; bring your handlebars toward you or push them further back.
physical.Removable Pedals: Quick-release pedals easily detach from the bike for compact transport.
physical.Lock-on Grips: Ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.
physical.Saddle: A custom-designed saddle compliments a sportier look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.
physical.Kickstand: A heavy-duty side-sweeping kickstand located near the chain stay keeps the eBike upright.
physical.Accessory Mounting Points: The frame features multiple mounting points throughout the eBike for various accessory combinations.
physical.Hidden Cable Routing: The down tube of the frame houses the main cables for a premium experience at no extra cost.
physical.Frame: 6000-series-aluminum frame is sturdy yet lightweight. The chainstays feature vertical dropouts and speciality designed splits on each side for easy access to the belt drive.
physical.Green Packaging: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.
physical.One Minute, Tool-Free Assembly: Simply attach the quick-release pedals, unfold the handlebar stem, and install the front wheel via the thru axle.
physical.Safety Certified: The Lectric ONE is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the ONE's lithium-ion battery is certified to UL 2271.

technical.Thumb Throttle: An ergonomic below-the-bar trigger throttle on the left hand side is easily engaged with your thumb while simultaneously eliminating joint fatigue.
technical.Motor Controller: 24 amp controller is IP-65 rated and potted for weather proofing and thermal management.
technical.Motor: A Sutto 750W rear hub-motor (1310W Peak) with 85Nm of torque delivers power and speed quicker than ever before. New Stealth M24 technology is 400% quieter*, delivering a hushed motor experience without sacrificing power.
technical.Battery: Available with a Long-Range 48V 14ah (672 Wh) lithium-ion battery certified to UL 2271 to power your ride for up to 60 miles, respectively.†‡ The Lectric ONE is also certified to UL 2849.

A pre-select feature automatically sets the rider's gears, allowing effortless auto-shifts, while a convenient start-select feature lets riders dictate their starting gear ahead of time, allowing for split-second starts.

Instead, the Lectric ONE has a simply designed and affordable cadence sensor with 96 magnets simulated so you can reach high speeds with ease.
technical.Charging: An external charging port provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The Lectric ONE comes standard with a 2amp charger for 5-7 hour charging.

features.detail: An ergonomic below-the-bar trigger throttle on the left hand side is easily engaged with your thumb while simultaneously eliminating joint fatigue.

features.name: Color LCD Display
features.detail: A backlit, heads-up color LCD display with a USB-A port provides trip and battery intelligence on the go. IP-65 rated electrical components ensure greater water and dust resistance.

features.name: Motor Controller
features.detail: 24 amp controller is IP-65 rated and potted for weather proofing and thermal management.

features.name: Motor
features.detail: A Sutto 750W rear hub-motor (1310W Peak) with 85Nm of torque delivers power and speed quicker than ever before. New Stealth M24 technology is 400% quieter*, delivering a hushed motor experience without sacrificing power.

features.name: Battery
features.detail: Available with a Long-Range 48V 14ah (672 Wh) lithium-ion battery certified to UL 2271 to power your ride for up to 60 miles, respectively.†‡ The Lectric ONE is also certified to UL 2849.

features.name: Bike Weight
features.detail: Total bike weight is 48lbs with the 7lb battery removed.

features.name: City Tires
features.detail: 20x2.5'' city tires featuring a reflective strip are equipped with 3mm Hippo Skin with an Aramid Floc Breaker. Shark Skin Protection on the sidewall offers pinch flat protection and all-weather reliability. Slime is installed to prevent flat tires at no additional cost.

features.name: Front Fork
features.detail: This rigid fork is fully aluminum and ultra lightweight, featuring a thru axle dropout.

features.name: Thru Axle
features.detail: The front wheel features a Thru Axle wheel attachment system for tool-free installation. This feature ensures a straight wheel, consistent brake rotor alignment, and handling stability. Remove the wheel in minutes for an easy and light-weight transport.

features.name: Pinion Gearbox
features.detail: With the Pinion C1.6i six-speed sealed weatherproof gearbox, shifting is done at the touch of a button – quickly, ergonomically, and intuitively. The system shifts while riding, while stationary, and while under load.

features.name: Pinion Smart.Shift App
features.detail: All gearbox functions are combined in the Pinion Smart.Shift App, which can be easily paired and customized to suit your preferences. A pre-select feature automatically sets the rider's gears, allowing effortless auto-shifts, while a convenient start-select feature lets riders dictate their starting gear ahead of time, allowing for split-second starts.

features.name: Cranks
features.detail: Pinion aluminum cranks are 165mm in length.

features.name: Belt Drive
features.detail: Gates CDC 113-tooth Carbon Drive Belt System is lightweight and carbon fiber-reinforced. The belt’s performance is nearly maintenance-free while providing a chainless drivetrain that’s clean, quiet, smooth, and strong.

features.name: Gates Carbon Drive App
features.detail: The Gates app is used to measure belt tension sonically. The belt can be plucked like a guitar string while the app uses the microphone on a mobile device to read the vibration frequency and compares it to a chart to determine if any adjustments are needed.

features.name: Belt Cogs
features.detail: A Gates CDC 24-tooth steel rear belt cog is paired with an aluminum CDX 39-tooth front cog providing a ratio-optimized performance to accommodate a wide range of speeds.

features.name: Brakes
features.detail: Hydraulic mineral oil brakes and 180mm rotors (1.8mm thick) offer ultimate stopping power and peace of mind in wet or dry conditions.

features.name: Lectric PWR™
features.detail: Lectric's Pedal Assist Wattage Regulation (PWR) programming allows for an improved Pedal Assist experience by assisting the rider up to a certain power level for each PAS setting, instead of limiting the assistance by speed alone. Learn more about PWR here.

features.name: PAS Sensor
features.detail: Lectric's PWR™ allows the rider to control the eBike's output with no additional effort so that a torque sensor is not necessary for smooth rides. Instead, the Lectric ONE has a simply designed and affordable cadence sensor with 96 magnets simulated so you can reach high speeds with ease.

features.name: Safety Lights
features.detail: An integrated safety system, featuring a headlamp and a brake-activated taillight powered by the battery allows you to be seen at any time of day.

features.name: Charging
features.detail: An external charging port provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The Lectric ONE comes standard with a 2amp charger for 5-7 hour charging.

features.name: Telescoping Seat Post
features.detail: An adjustable and removable seat post allows riders to reach a range of heights while maintaining comfort and stability.

features.name: Adjustable Handlebar Stem
features.detail: Easily adjustable handlebar stem riser includes a quick-release lever to comfortably adjust your handlebar reach to your liking; bring your handlebars toward you or push them further back.

features.name: Removable Pedals
features.detail: Quick-release pedals easily detach from the bike for compact transport.

features.name: Lock-on Grips
features.detail: Ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.

features.name: Saddle
features.detail: A custom-designed saddle compliments a sportier look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.

features.name: Kickstand
features.detail: A heavy-duty side-sweeping kickstand located near the chain stay keeps the eBike upright.

features.name: Accessory Mounting Points
features.detail: The frame features multiple mounting points throughout the eBike for various accessory combinations.

features.name: Hidden Cable Routing
features.detail: The down tube of the frame houses the main cables for a premium experience at no extra cost.

features.name: Frame
features.detail: 6000-series-aluminum frame is sturdy yet lightweight. The chainstays feature vertical dropouts and speciality designed splits on each side for easy access to the belt drive.

features.name: Green Packaging
features.detail: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.

features.name: One Minute, Tool-Free Assembly
features.detail: Simply attach the quick-release pedals, unfold the handlebar stem, and install the front wheel via the thru axle.

features.name: Safety Certified
features.detail: The Lectric ONE is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the ONE's lithium-ion battery is certified to UL 2271.

all.Saddle: A custom-designed saddle compliments a sportier look and can be angle adjusted.
all.Folding Capabilities: A foldable design at both the handlebar stem and main frame guarantees your ride will fit into virtually any compact space.
all.Kickstand: A heavy-duty side-sweeping kickstand located near the chain stay keeps the eBike upright.
all.Folding Pedals: Push-fold pedals are easily compressed for compact transport.
all.Accessory Mounting Points: The frame features multiple mounting points throughout the eBike for various accessory combinations.
all.Front Fork: Rigid Steel Fork with a threadless headset.
all.One Minute, Tool-Free Assembly: Simply unfold the stem assembly, insert the stem and handlebars, and unfold the pedals.
all.Green Packaging: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.
all.Safety Certified: The Lectric XP Lite is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the XP Lite's lithium-ion battery is certified to UL 2271.

features.name: Pedal-Assist
features.detail: Five levels of pedal-assist and a twist throttle deliver the speed and power to own the road as a Class 1 or 2 eBike.**

features.name: Twist-Grip Throttle
features.detail: A half-twist throttle is easily engaged with a flick of the wrist to deliver pure power on demand.

features.name: Color LCD Display
features.detail: A backlit, color LCD display with a USB-A port provides trip and battery intelligence on the go. IP-65 rated electrical components ensure greater water and dust resistance.

features.name: Battery
features.detail: Available with a Standard or Long-Range 48V lithium-ion battery (375Wh or 672Wh) certified to UL 2271 to power your ride for up to 80 miles, respectively.*† The Lectric XP Lite is also certified to UL 2849.

features.name: Motor
features.detail: A 300W rear hub-motor (819W Peak) with 28Nm of torque delivers power and speed quicker than ever before. Stealth M24 technology is 400% quieter‡, delivering a hushed motor experience without sacrificing power.

features.name: Motor Controller
features.detail: 15 amp controller is IP-65 rated with built in thermal sensors to eliminate burn-out.

features.name: Brakes
features.detail: Hydraulic mineral oil brakes and 180mm rotors (1.8mm thick) offer ultimate stopping power and peace of mind in wet or dry conditions.

features.name: Tires
features.detail: 20x2.5'' slick tires featuring a reflective strip are equipped with 3mm Hippo Skin with an Aramid Floc Breaker. Slime is installed to prevent flat tires at no additional cost.

features.name: Bike Weight
features.detail: Total bike weight is 41lbs with the 8lb battery removed making this is one of the most portable eBikes on the market.

features.name: Crankset
features.detail: Forged aluminum, 52-tooth chainring is the perfect ratio for effortless 20-inch wheel pedaling.

features.name: Drivetrain
features.detail: 52 x 16 tooth single speed drivetrain makes riding efficient and seamless.

features.name: Chain
features.detail: KMC Z1 steel chain offers consistent tension and secure performance throughout your ride.

features.name: Lectric PWR™
features.detail: Lectric's Pedal Assist Wattage Regulation (PWR) programming allows for an improved Pedal Assist experience by assisting the rider up to a certain power level for each PAS setting, instead of limiting the assistance by speed alone. Learn more about PWR here. Prefer full wattage while you ride? Access the advanced settings of your display to toggle off PWR Programming.

features.name: PAS Sensor
features.detail: Lectric's PWR™ allows the rider to control the eBike's output with no additional effort so that a torque sensor is not necessary for smooth rides. Instead, the Lectric XP Lite has a simply designed and affordable cadence sensor.

features.name: Safety Lights
features.detail: An integrated safety system, featuring a headlamp and taillight powered by the battery allows you to be seen at any time of day.

features.name: Charging
features.detail: An external charging port provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XP Lite comes standard with a 2amp charger for 5-7 hour charging.

features.name: Size Adjustable
features.detail: An adjustable and removable seat post and a telescoping handlebar stem allows riders to reach a wide range of heights while maintaining comfort and stability.

features.name: Grips
features.detail: Soft durometer ergonomic grips add comfort so you can ride longer. Removable caps on the end allow for various accessory add-on.

features.name: Handlebars
features.detail: Newly added BMX-style handlebars are sturdy, comfortable, and offer more opportunities for customizing your ride with accessories.

features.name: Saddle
features.detail: A custom-designed saddle compliments a sportier look and can be angle adjusted.

features.name: Folding Capabilities
features.detail: A foldable design at both the handlebar stem and main frame guarantees your ride will fit into virtually any compact space.

features.name: Kickstand
features.detail: A heavy-duty side-sweeping kickstand located near the chain stay keeps the eBike upright.

features.name: Folding Pedals
features.detail: Push-fold pedals are easily compressed for compact transport.

features.name: Accessory Mounting Points
features.detail: The frame features multiple mounting points throughout the eBike for various accessory combinations.

features.name: Front Fork
features.detail: Rigid Steel Fork with a threadless headset.

features.name: Frame
features.detail: 6000-series-aluminum frame is sturdy yet lightweight.

features.name: One Minute, Tool-Free Assembly
features.detail: Simply unfold the stem assembly, insert the stem and handlebars, and unfold the pedals.

features.name: Green Packaging
features.detail: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.

features.name: Safety Certified
features.detail: The Lectric XP Lite is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the XP Lite's lithium-ion battery is certified to UL 2271.

performance_options: Standard Battery + Gates Carbon Belt Drive -$100
Long-Range Battery + Gates Carbon Belt Drive +$100 Sold Out

general_info.fully_foldable: A foldable hinge at both the handlebar stem and frame guarantees your ride will fit into virtually any compact space. Remove the front wheel, battery, and the seat post in seconds for easy and lightweight transport.
general_info.weight: Total bike weight is 79 lbs. without the battery installed. The XP Trike2 750 long-range battery weighs 9lbs.
general_info.pick_your_pedal_response: Choose between responsive pedaling vs. standard pedaling with an easy adjustment to the settings, switching between a torque or cadence sensor. The torque sensor offers a more natural, smooth feel with intuitive power that responds to your pedal pressure. The cadence sensor provides power with each revolution of the pedals, making it a great option for beginners or anyone looking for a more relaxed ride.

ebike_system.twist_throttle: A half-twist throttle located on the right handlebar delivers pure power on demand.

stealth_m24_motor.details: A rear hub motor  with of supplies power and speed quicker than ever before. Stealth M24 technology ensures a quieter motor experience without sacrificing power

battery.details: A removable, lithium-ion battery certified to UL 2271 makes for a clean design while powering your ride for up to 70 miles on a single charge.** The XP Trike2 750 is also certified to UL 2849.†

tft_lcd_display.details: A custom color TFT display featuring a detachable mount and a USB-C port provides trip, battery, power intelligence on the go. New intuitive drop-down menus make navigating the settings on your eBike easy to understand & allow users to customize their ride settings based on preference. The IP-X5-rated display ensures greater water resistance

ebike_system.pedal_assist_sensor: A 12-magnet cadence sensor paired with our in-house-designed wattage regulation programming will give you controlled power distribution and a range-optimized riding experience.
ebike_system.easy_charging: An external charging port provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XP Trike2 750 comes standard with a 2amp charger for 7-9 hour charging, but a 5amp Fast Charger can be purchased separately, which can charge the long-range battery in as little as 3.5 hours.

motor_controller.details: 20amp internal controller is IP-X5 rated and potted for weatherproofing and thermal management

ebike_system.torque_sensor: Our proprietary in-house-designed torque sensor programming will give you smoother power distribution and a better riding experience. It is designed to manage power output based on the rider’s pedaling effort. With this programming experience, riders can reach higher speeds easily and with more control than ever before.

special_features.5_riding_modes: Five riding modes deliver the speed and power to own the road as a Class 1 or 2 eBike.* New simplified labels, including Eco, Tour, Sport, Sport+, & Turbo, allow riders to choose their riding experience.
special_features.keyless_riding: Turn your bike on and off with the push of a button, and start riding without having the key in the battery! Keys are needed to remove the battery from the bike frame only.

safety.safety_lights: An integrated safety system, featuring a new bright 90-lumen headlamp with side amber lights and a brake-activated rear light powered by the internal battery, allows you to be seen at any time of day.
safety.turn_signals: Alert drivers, riders, and people nearby with turn signals. Simply use the left or right arrows on the button pad to turn on the blinkers on either side of the rear light.

certifications.safety_certified: We ensure that the electrical and battery components are manufactured to the industry standard. The Lectric XP Trike2 750 is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the lithium-ion battery on the XP Trike2 750 is certified to UL 2271.

suspension_fork.details: The Cloud 50 suspension front fork provides shock absorption for a smooth and cloud-soft ride. Adjust the preload or lock it out to tailor each ride to your preference based on payload capacity and weight distribution

frameset.redesigned_frame: The XP Trike2 750 is crafted with a hydroformed 6000-series aluminum frame that's ultra-strong and up to 30% lighter than comparable steel frames. The reinforced downtube and re-engineered geometry—featuring a set-back seat tube and lowered rear rack—enhance stability and comfort, especially at higher speeds or on uneven paths.

drivetrain.drivetrain: A 16-tooth single-speed freewheel paired with a forged aluminum, 36-tooth custom chainring makes riding efficient and is the perfect ratio for effortless 20-inch wheel pedaling.

chain.details: A Z8 steel chain offers consistent tension for a secure performance throughout your ride

drivetrain.pedals: Custom-designed 6000 Series Aluminum pedals with protruding grip pins improve foot traction for an optimal experience.

hydraulic_brakes.details: Get ultimate stopping power with Star Union hydraulic brakes paired with rotors (2.3mm thick), making it as easy to stop as it is to go, whether in wet or dry conditions. Paired with ergonomically designed aluminum brake levers for durability

parking_brakes.details: Lock your trike tires while they aren't in use to keep your ride secure with our front and rear parking brakes. Blue levers on both sides of the handlebars can be micro-adjusted from a locked or unlocked position and engaged with a pull from the brake lever

tires_with_slime.details: Puncture-resistant 20” x 2.5” slim tires allow you to turn on a dime, while an updated tread pattern improves efficiency. The sidewall features reflective strips for better visibility at night. Slime is installed to prevent flat tires—at no additional cost

wheelset.differential_axle: The 2-wheel-drive, all-wheel braking system is made possible by the open, dual-differential axle. Both the motor and the stationary rotor are centered on the axle, providing power and brakes to both rear wheels. This design ensures stability by creating a balanced center of gravity.
wheelset.thru_axle: The front wheel features a thru-axle wheel attachment system for a quick and easy installation. This feature ensures a straight wheel, consistent brake rotor alignment, and handling stability. Remove the wheel in minutes for an easy and lightweight transport.

cockpit.lock_on_grips: Ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.
cockpit.saddle: A custom-designed saddle complements a sporty look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.
cockpit.adjustable_handlebar_stem: Ride longer and more comfortably in an upright cruising position with our new 9-degree stem, which shortens the handlebar reach. Plus, telescoping functionality allows riders to reach a wide range of heights while maintaining comfort and stability.
cockpit.telescoping_seat_post: Customize the bike to your perfect size by adjusting the seat post height; simply open the quick-release collar and slide the post to your preferred height and lock it in place by closing the collar.

geometry.payload_capacity: Max: 415 lbs. Never exceed the payload capacity. Distribute weight within the guidelines: Max Rider weight 330 lbs, Max Front Basket Weight 30 lbs, Max Rear Basket Weight 75 lbs.

included_accessories.rear_rack: A rear rack integrated into the bike frame holds up to 75 lbs. and features bosses for mounting various accessory combinations.
included_accessories.fenders: Polypropylene fenders protect you and your ride from debris. The flexible material is damage-resistant and helps ensure long-term durability.

general_other.beginner_preset: If you haven’t been on a bike in a while, the XP Trike2 750 comes with a power-limiting feature to slow acceleration and limits max speed to 5 mph in riding modes Eco and Tour. Once you get comfortable, you can unlock faster settings.
general_other.hidden_cable_routing: The down tube of the frame houses the main cables for a premium experience at no extra cost.
general_other.green_packaging: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable. Carefully crafted and engineered so you won’t have to lift any components out of the box.
general_other.one_minute_tool_free_assembly: Simply unfold the stem assembly and frame, insert the stem & handlebars, and quickly attach the front wheel and display screen. Non-essential riding components such as fenders, headlights, and other accessories can be installed at your convenience.

geometry.payload_capacity: Max: 415 lbs. Never exceed the payload capacity. Distribute weight within the guidelines: Max Rider weight 330 lbs, Max Front Basket Weight 30 lbs, Max Rear Basket Weight 75 lbs.

Upgraded Motor & Battery +$0 50% more power, 30% more range

features.detail: A 16-tooth single-speed freewheel paired with a forged aluminum, 36-tooth custom chainring makes riding efficient and is the perfect ratio for effortless 20-inch wheel pedaling.

features.name: Chain
features.detail: A KMC Z8 steel chain offers consistent tension for a secure performance throughout your ride.

features.name: Hydraulic Brakes
features.detail: Get ultimate stopping power with Star Union hydraulic brakes paired with 180mm rotors (2.3mm thick), making it as easy to stop as it is to go, whether in wet or dry conditions. Paired with ergonomically designed aluminum brake levers for durability.

features.name: Safety Lights
features.detail: An integrated safety system, featuring a new bright 90-lumen headlamp with side amber lights and a brake-activated rear light powered by the internal battery, allows you to be seen at any time of day.

features.name: Turn Signals
features.detail: Alert drivers, riders, and people nearby with turn signals. Simply use the left or right arrows on the button pad to turn on the blinkers on either side of the rear light.

features.name: Parking Brakes
features.detail: Lock your trike tires while they aren't in use to keep your ride secure with our front and rear parking brakes. Blue levers on both sides of the handlebars can be micro-adjusted from a locked or unlocked position and engaged with a pull from the brake lever.

features.name: Differential Axle
features.detail: The 2-wheel-drive, all-wheel braking system is made possible by the open, dual-differential axle. Both the motor and the stationary rotor are centered on the axle, providing power and brakes to both rear wheels. This design ensures stability by creating a balanced center of gravity.

features.name: Fenders
features.detail: Polypropylene fenders protect you and your ride from debris. The flexible material is damage-resistant and helps ensure long-term durability.

features.name: Pedals
features.detail: Custom-designed 6000 Series Aluminum pedals with protruding grip pins improve foot traction for an optimal experience.

features.name: Lock-on Grips
features.detail: Ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.

features.name: Saddle
features.detail: A custom-designed saddle complements a sporty look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.

features.name: Adjustable Handlebar Stem
features.detail: Ride longer and more comfortably in an upright cruising position with our new 9-degree stem, which shortens the handlebar reach. Plus, telescoping functionality allows riders to reach a wide range of heights while maintaining comfort and stability.

features.name: Telescoping Seat Post
features.detail: Customize the bike to your perfect size by adjusting the seat post height; simply open the quick-release collar and slide the post to your preferred height and lock it in place by closing the collar.

features.name: Fully Foldable
features.detail: A foldable hinge at both the handlebar stem and frame guarantees your ride will fit into virtually any compact space. Remove the front wheel, battery, and the seat post in seconds for easy and lightweight transport.

features.name: Weight
features.detail: Total bike weight is 79 lbs. without the battery installed. The XP Trike2 standard battery weighs 7lbs.

features.name: Easy Charging
features.detail: An external charging port provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XP Trike2 comes standard with a 2amp charger for 5-7 hour charging, but a 5amp Fast Charger can be purchased separately, which can charge the standard battery in as little as 3 hours.

features.name: Motor Controller
features.detail: 20amp internal controller is IP-X5 rated and potted for weatherproofing and thermal management.

features.name: Thru Axle
features.detail: The front wheel features a thru-axle wheel attachment system for a quick and easy installation. This feature ensures a straight wheel, consistent brake rotor alignment, and handling stability. Remove the wheel in minutes for an easy and lightweight transport.

features.name: Hidden Cable Routing
features.detail: The down tube of the frame houses the main cables for a premium experience at no extra cost.

features.name: Green Packaging
features.detail: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable. Carefully crafted and engineered so you won’t have to lift any components out of the box.

features.name: Color
features.detail: Glacier Blue

features.name: One-Minute, Tool-Free Assembly
features.detail: Simply unfold the stem assembly and frame, insert the stem & handlebars, and quickly attach the front wheel and display screen. Non-essential riding components such as fenders, headlights, and other accessories can be installed at your convenience.

features.name: Safety Certified
features.detail: We ensure that the electrical and battery components are manufactured to the industry standard. The Lectric XP Trike2 is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the XP Trike2's lithium-ion battery is certified to UL 2271.

performance_options: Upgraded Motor & Battery +$300 50% more power, 30% more range

configs.label: Lectric XP Trike2 High-Step Long-Range

geometry.Payload Capacity: Max: 415 lbs. Never exceed the payload capacity. Distribute weight within the guidelines: Max Rider weight 330 lbs, Max Front Basket Weight 30 lbs, Max Rear Basket Weight 75 lbs.

physical.Beginner Preset: If you haven’t been on a bike in a while, the XP Trike2 750 comes with a power-limiting feature to slow acceleration and limits max speed to 5 mph in riding modes Eco and Tour. Once you get comfortable, you can unlock faster settings.
physical.Suspension Fork: The Cloud 50 suspension front fork provides shock absorption for a smooth and cloud-soft ride. Adjust the preload or lock it out to tailor each ride to your preference based on payload capacity and weight distribution.
physical.Rear Rack: A rear rack integrated into the bike frame holds up to 75 lbs. and features bosses for mounting various accessory combinations.
physical.Redesigned Frame: The XP Trike2 750 is crafted with a hydroformed 6000-series aluminum frame that's ultra-strong and up to 30% lighter than comparable steel frames. The reinforced downtube and re-engineered geometry—featuring a set-back seat tube and lowered rear rack—enhance stability and comfort, especially at higher speeds or on uneven paths.
physical.Tires—with Slime!: Puncture-resistant 20” x 2.5” slim tires allow you to turn on a dime, while an updated tread pattern improves efficiency. The sidewall features reflective strips for better visibility at night. Slime is installed to prevent flat tires—at no additional cost.
physical.Pick your Pedal Response: Choose between responsive pedaling vs. standard pedaling with an easy adjustment to the settings, switching between a torque or cadence sensor. The torque sensor offers a more natural, smooth feel with intuitive power that responds to your pedal pressure. The cadence sensor provides power with each revolution of the pedals, making it a great option for beginners or anyone looking for a more relaxed ride.

physical.Fenders: Polypropylene fenders protect you and your ride from debris. The flexible material is damage-resistant and helps ensure long-term durability.
physical.Pedals: Custom-designed 6000 Series Aluminum pedals with protruding grip pins improve foot traction for an optimal experience.
physical.Lock-on Grips: Ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.
physical.Saddle: A custom-designed saddle complements a sporty look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.
physical.Adjustable Handlebar Stem: Ride longer and more comfortably in an upright cruising position with our new 9-degree stem, which shortens the handlebar reach. Plus, telescoping functionality allows riders to reach a wide range of heights while maintaining comfort and stability.

physical.Fully Foldable: A foldable hinge at both the handlebar stem and frame guarantees your ride will fit into virtually any compact space. Remove the front wheel, battery, and the seat post in seconds for easy and lightweight transport.
physical.Weight: Total bike weight is 79 lbs. without the battery installed. The XP Trike2 750 long-range battery weighs 9lbs.

technical.5 Riding Modes: Five riding modes deliver the speed and power to own the road as a Class 1 or 2 eBike.* New simplified labels, including Eco, Tour, Sport, Sport+, & Turbo, allow riders to choose their riding experience.
technical.Twist Throttle: A half-twist throttle located on the right handlebar delivers pure power on demand.
technical.Stealth M24 Motor: A 750W rear hub motor (1310W peak) with 85 Nm of torque supplies power and speed quicker than ever before. Stealth M24 technology ensures a quieter motor experience without sacrificing power.
technical.Battery: A removable 48V, 17.5Ah (840 Wh) lithium-ion battery certified to UL 2271 makes for a clean design while powering your ride for up to 70 miles on a single charge.** The XP Trike2 750 is also certified to UL 2849.†
technical.Keyless Riding: Turn your bike on and off with the push of a button, and start riding without having the key in the battery! Keys are needed to remove the battery from the bike frame only.
technical.TFT LCD Display: A custom color TFT display featuring a detachable mount and a USB-C port provides trip, battery, & power intelligence on the go. New intuitive drop-down menus make navigating the settings on your eBike easy to understand & allow users to customize their ride settings based on preference. The IP-X5-rated display ensures greater water resistance.
technical.Torque Sensor: Our proprietary in-house-designed torque sensor programming will give you smoother power distribution and a better riding experience. It is designed to manage power output based on the rider’s pedaling effort. With this programming experience, riders can reach higher speeds easily and with more control than ever before.
technical.Easy Charging: An external charging port provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XP Trike2 750 comes standard with a 2amp charger for 7-9 hour charging, but a 5amp Fast Charger can be purchased separately, which can charge the long-range battery in as little as 3.5 hours.
technical.Motor Controller: 24amp internal controller is IP-X5 rated and potted for weatherproofing and thermal management.

general_info.fully_foldable: A foldable hinge at both the handlebar stem and frame guarantees your ride will fit into virtually any compact space. Remove the pedals and the seat post in seconds for easy and lightweight transport.
general_info.weight: Total bike weight is 62lbs without the battery installed. The XP4 long-range battery weighs 9lbs.

ebike_system.thumb_throttle: An ergonomic below-the-bar trigger throttle on the left-hand side is easily engaged with your thumb while simultaneously eliminating joint fatigue.

stealth_m24_motor.details: A rear hub motor  with of supplies power and speed quicker than ever before. Stealth M24 technology delivers a quieter motor experience without sacrificing power

battery.details: An integrated & removable, lithium-ion battery certified to UL 2271 makes for a clean design while powering your ride for up to 50 miles on a single charge.** The XP4 is also certified to UL 2849.† Removing the battery from the frame is a breeze with the side-facing key port location

tft_lcd_display.details: A custom color TFT display featuring a detachable mount and a USB-C port. You’ll find trip, battery, power intelligence on the go. New intuitive drop-down menus make navigating the settings on your eBike easy to understand & allow users to customize their ride settings based on preference. The IP-X5-rated display ensures greater water resistance

ebike_system.torque_sensor: Our proprietary in-house-designed torque sensor programming will give you smoother power distribution and a better riding experience. It is designed to manage power output based on the rider’s pedaling effort. With this programming experience, riders can reach higher speeds easily and with more control than ever before.
ebike_system.easy_charging: An auxiliary charging port near the bottom bracket provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XP4 750 comes standard with a 2amp charger for 7-9 hour charging, but a 5amp Fast Charger can be purchased separately, which can charge the long-range battery in as little as 3.5 hours.

motor_controller.details: 20amp internal controller is IP-X5 rated and potted for weatherproofing and thermal management

special_features.5_riding_modes: Five riding modes deliver the speed and power to own the road as a Class 1, 2, or 3 eBike.* New simplified labels, including Eco, Tour, Sport, Sport+, & Turbo, allow riders to choose their riding experience.
special_features.new_keyless_riding: Turn your bike on and off with the push of a button, and start riding without having the key in the battery! Keys are needed to remove the battery from the bike frame only. We’ve listened to our loyal riders, and you can now ride key-free!
special_features.co_pilot_capable: The LevelUp Rack (sold separately) can be added to the integrated rear rack and has a built-in mounting window to easily install children's seats like the Thule Maxx Yepp Seat. If they have outgrown a standard child seat, our Buddy Seat (sold separately) contains an open padded seat, handlebars, and foot pegs that allow you to bring them along for the ride!***

safety.safety_lights: An integrated safety system, featuring a new bright 90-lumen headlamp with side amber lights and a brake-activated rear light powered by the internal battery, allows you to be seen at any time of day.
safety.turn_signals: Alert drivers, riders, and people nearby with our turn signals. Simply use the left or right arrows on the button pad to turn on the blinkers on either side of the rear light.

certifications.safety_certified: We ensure that the electrical and battery components are manufactured to the industry standard. The Lectric XP4 is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the XP4's lithium-ion battery is certified to UL 2271.

suspension_fork.details: The front fork provides shock absorption for a smooth and comfortable ride. Adjust the tension or lock it out to tailor each ride to your preference based on payload capacity and weight distribution

frameset.fully_redesigned_frame: The newly designed, more aesthetic XP4 frame is lightweight and features sturdy 6000 series aluminum with mounting points for various accessory combinations.

drivetrain.drivetrain: An 11-32 tooth, 8-speed freewheel paired with a Shimano Altus derailleur and a below-the-bar trigger shifter allows you to swiftly change gears while riding to create pedaling efficiency and an easier riding experience at higher speeds.

crankset.details: Forged aluminum, 56-tooth custom chainring is the perfect ratio for effortless 20-inch wheel pedaling

chain.details: A Z8 steel chain with inner plate chamfering offers consistent tension and smooth transitions between shifting for a secure performance throughout your ride

drivetrain.quick_release_pedals: Custom-designed 6000 Series Aluminum quick-release pedals with splined inserts allow for easy, tool-free removal and installation. The new shape of the pedals improves foot traction for an optimal experience.

602_hydraulic_brakes.details: Get ultimate stopping power with 602 hydraulic brakes paired with rotors (2.3mm thick), making it as easy to stop as it is to go, whether in wet or dry conditions. Paired with ergonomically designed aluminum brake levers for durability

tires_with_slime.details: Puncture-resistant 20” x 3” tires are perfect for mixed terrains and make for a smoother ride. The new custom tread pattern has less rolling resistance for better power efficiency and delivers an ultra-quiet experience. Slime is installed to prevent flat tires—at no additional cost

cockpit.lock_on_grips: Full-length ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.
cockpit.saddle: A custom-designed saddle complements a sporty look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.
cockpit.adjustable_handlebar_stem: Ride longer and more comfortably in an upright cruising position with our new zero-degree stem, which shortens the handlebar reach. Plus, telescoping functionality allows riders to reach a wide range of heights while maintaining comfort and stability.
cockpit.telescoping_seat_post: Customize the bike to your perfect size by adjusting the seat post height; simply open the quick-release collar and slide the post to your preferred height and lock it in place by closing the collar.

included_accessories.folding_kickstand: A heavy-duty steel side-sweeping kickstand located near the chainstay keeps the eBike upright.
included_accessories.fenders: Polypropylene fenders with a flared tail protect you and your ride from debris. The flexible material is damage-resistant and helps ensure long-term durability.

general_other.green_packaging: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.
general_other.one_minute_tool_free_assembly: Simply unfold the stem assembly, insert the stem & handlebars, and quickly attach the pedals and display screen.
general_other.tested_for_durability: Our eBikes are built with industry-leading safety certifications so you can have peace of mind riding in almost any condition. A US-based bicycle testing lab put the XP4 through the rigorous ISO 4210 standard testing process.

performance: Upgraded Motor & Battery +$300 50% more power, 68% more range
Upgraded Motor & Battery +$0 50% more power, 68% more range

choices.value: Upgraded Motor & Battery +$300 50% more power, 68% more range
Upgraded Motor & Battery +$0 50% more power, 68% more range

free_accessories.name: Safety Lights
free_accessories.detail: An integrated safety system, featuring a new bright 90-lumen headlamp with side amber lights and a brake-activated rear light powered by the internal battery, allows you to be seen at any time of day.

configs.label: Lectric XP4 High-Step Standard

physical.Rear Rack: A new rear rack design integrated into the bike frame holds up to 150lbs and features bosses for mounting various accessory combinations. Add a LevelUp Rack (sold separately) on top of the rack to unlock even more accessory combinations!
physical.Co-Pilot Capable: The LevelUp Rack (sold separately) can be added to the integrated rear rack and has a built-in mounting window to easily install children's seats like the Thule Maxx Yepp Seat. If they have outgrown a standard child seat, our Buddy Seat (sold separately) contains an open padded seat, handlebars, and foot pegs that allow you to bring them along for the ride!***
physical.Tires—with Slime!: Puncture-resistant 20” x 3” tires are perfect for mixed terrains and make for a smoother ride. The new custom tread pattern has less rolling resistance for better power efficiency and delivers an ultra-quiet experience. Slime is installed to prevent flat tires—at no additional cost.
physical.Drivetrain: An 11-32 tooth, 8-speed freewheel paired with a Shimano Altus derailleur and a below-the-bar trigger shifter allows you to swiftly change gears while riding to create pedaling efficiency and an easier riding experience at higher speeds.
physical.Crankset: Forged aluminum, 56-tooth custom chainring is the perfect ratio for effortless 20-inch wheel pedaling.
physical.Chain: A KMC Z8 steel chain with inner plate chamfering offers consistent tension and smooth transitions between shifting for a secure performance throughout your ride.
physical.602 Hydraulic Brakes: Get ultimate stopping power with 602 hydraulic brakes paired with 180mm rotors (2.3mm thick), making it as easy to stop as it is to go, whether in wet or dry conditions. Paired with ergonomically designed aluminum brake levers for durability.
physical.Safety Lights: An integrated safety system, featuring a new bright 90-lumen headlamp with side amber lights and a brake-activated rear light powered by the internal battery, allows you to be seen at any time of day.
physical.Turn Signals: Alert drivers, riders, and people nearby with our turn signals. Simply use the left or right arrows on the button pad to turn on the blinkers on either side of the rear light.
physical.Suspension Fork: The front fork provides shock absorption for a smooth and comfortable ride. Adjust the tension or lock it out to tailor each ride to your preference based on payload capacity and weight distribution.
physical.Folding Kickstand: A heavy-duty steel side-sweeping kickstand located near the chainstay keeps the eBike upright.
physical.Fenders: Polypropylene fenders with a flared tail protect you and your ride from debris. The flexible material is damage-resistant and helps ensure long-term durability.
physical.Quick-Release Pedals: Custom-designed 6000 Series Aluminum quick-release pedals with splined inserts allow for easy, tool-free removal and installation. The new shape of the pedals improves foot traction for an optimal experience.
physical.Lock-on Grips: Full-length ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.
physical.Saddle: A custom-designed saddle complements a sporty look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.
physical.Adjustable Handlebar Stem: Ride longer and more comfortably in an upright cruising position with our new zero-degree stem, which shortens the handlebar reach. Plus, telescoping functionality allows riders to reach a wide range of heights while maintaining comfort and stability.
physical.Telescoping Seat Post: Customize the bike to your perfect size by adjusting the seat post height; simply open the quick-release collar and slide the post to your preferred height and lock it in place by closing the collar.
physical.Fully Foldable: A foldable hinge at both the handlebar stem and frame guarantees your ride will fit into virtually any compact space. Remove the pedals and the seat post in seconds for easy and lightweight transport.
physical.Weight: Total bike weight is 62lbs without the battery installed. The XP4 battery weighs 7lbs.
physical.Fully Redesigned Frame: The newly designed, more aesthetic XP4 frame is lightweight and features sturdy 6000 series aluminum with mounting points for various accessory combinations.
physical.Green Packaging: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.
physical.One-Minute, Tool-Free Assembly: Simply unfold the stem assembly, insert the stem & handlebars, and quickly attach the pedals and display screen.
physical.Tested for Durability: Our eBikes are built with industry-leading safety certifications so you can have peace of mind riding in almost any condition. A US-based bicycle testing lab put the XP4 through the rigorous ISO 4210 standard testing process.
physical.Safety Certified: We ensure that the electrical and battery components are manufactured to the industry standard. The Lectric XP4 is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the XP4's lithium-ion battery is certified to UL 2271.

technical.5 Riding Modes: Five riding modes deliver the speed and power to own the road as a Class 1, 2, or 3 eBike.* New simplified labels, including Eco, Tour, Sport, Sport+, & Turbo, allow riders to choose their riding experience.
technical.Thumb Throttle: An ergonomic below-the-bar trigger throttle on the left-hand side is easily engaged with your thumb while simultaneously eliminating joint fatigue.
technical.Stealth M24 Motor: A 500W rear hub motor (1092W peak) with 55Nm of torque supplies power and speed quicker than ever before. Stealth M24 technology delivers a quieter motor experience without sacrificing power.
technical.Battery: An integrated & removable 48V, 10.4Ah (500Wh) lithium-ion battery certified to UL 2271 makes for a clean design while powering your ride for up to 50 miles on a single charge.** The XP4 is also certified to UL 2849.† Removing the battery from the frame is a breeze with the side-facing key port location.
technical.New: Keyless Riding: Turn your bike on and off with the push of a button, and start riding without having the key in the battery! Keys are needed to remove the battery from the bike frame only. We’ve listened to our loyal riders, and you can now ride key-free!
technical.TFT LCD Display: A custom color TFT display featuring a detachable mount and a USB-C port. You’ll find trip, battery, & power intelligence on the go. New intuitive drop-down menus make navigating the settings on your eBike easy to understand & allow users to customize their ride settings based on preference. The IP-X5-rated display ensures greater water resistance.
technical.Torque Sensor: Our proprietary in-house-designed torque sensor programming will give you smoother power distribution and a better riding experience. It is designed to manage power output based on the rider’s pedaling effort. With this programming experience, riders can reach higher speeds easily and with more control than ever before.
technical.Easy Charging: An auxiliary charging port near the bottom bracket provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XP4 comes standard with a 2amp charger for 4-6 hour charging, but a 5amp Fast Charger can be purchased separately, which can charge the standard battery in as little as 2 hours.
technical.Motor Controller: 20amp internal controller is IP-X5 rated and potted for weatherproofing and thermal management.

features.name: 5 Riding Modes
features.detail: Five riding modes deliver the speed and power to own the road as a Class 1, 2, or 3 eBike.* New simplified labels, including Eco, Tour, Sport, Sport+, & Turbo, allow riders to choose their riding experience.

features.name: Thumb Throttle
features.detail: An ergonomic below-the-bar trigger throttle on the left-hand side is easily engaged with your thumb while simultaneously eliminating joint fatigue.

features.name: Stealth M24 Motor
features.detail: A 500W rear hub motor (1092W peak) with 55Nm of torque supplies power and speed quicker than ever before. Stealth M24 technology delivers a quieter motor experience without sacrificing power.

features.name: Battery
features.detail: An integrated & removable 48V, 10.4Ah (500Wh) lithium-ion battery certified to UL 2271 makes for a clean design while powering your ride for up to 50 miles on a single charge.** The XP4 is also certified to UL 2849.† Removing the battery from the frame is a breeze with the side-facing key port location.

features.name: New: Keyless Riding
features.detail: Turn your bike on and off with the push of a button, and start riding without having the key in the battery! Keys are needed to remove the battery from the bike frame only. We’ve listened to our loyal riders, and you can now ride key-free!

features.name: Rear Rack
features.detail: A new rear rack design integrated into the bike frame holds up to 150lbs and features bosses for mounting various accessory combinations. Add a LevelUp Rack (sold separately) on top of the rack to unlock even more accessory combinations!

features.name: Co-Pilot Capable
features.detail: The LevelUp Rack (sold separately) can be added to the integrated rear rack and has a built-in mounting window to easily install children's seats like the Thule Maxx Yepp Seat. If they have outgrown a standard child seat, our Buddy Seat (sold separately) contains an open padded seat, handlebars, and foot pegs that allow you to bring them along for the ride!***

features.name: TFT LCD Display
features.detail: A custom color TFT display featuring a detachable mount and a USB-C port. You’ll find trip, battery, & power intelligence on the go. New intuitive drop-down menus make navigating the settings on your eBike easy to understand & allow users to customize their ride settings based on preference. The IP-X5-rated display ensures greater water resistance.

features.name: Tires—with Slime!
features.detail: Puncture-resistant 20” x 3” tires are perfect for mixed terrains and make for a smoother ride. The new custom tread pattern has less rolling resistance for better power efficiency and delivers an ultra-quiet experience. Slime is installed to prevent flat tires—at no additional cost.

features.name: Torque Sensor
features.detail: Our proprietary in-house-designed torque sensor programming will give you smoother power distribution and a better riding experience. It is designed to manage power output based on the rider’s pedaling effort. With this programming experience, riders can reach higher speeds easily and with more control than ever before.

features.name: Drivetrain
features.detail: An 11-32 tooth, 8-speed freewheel paired with a Shimano Altus derailleur and a below-the-bar trigger shifter allows you to swiftly change gears while riding to create pedaling efficiency and an easier riding experience at higher speeds.

features.name: Crankset
features.detail: Forged aluminum, 56-tooth custom chainring is the perfect ratio for effortless 20-inch wheel pedaling.

features.name: Chain
features.detail: A KMC Z8 steel chain with inner plate chamfering offers consistent tension and smooth transitions between shifting for a secure performance throughout your ride.

features.name: 602 Hydraulic Brakes
features.detail: Get ultimate stopping power with 602 hydraulic brakes paired with 180mm rotors (2.3mm thick), making it as easy to stop as it is to go, whether in wet or dry conditions. Paired with ergonomically designed aluminum brake levers for durability.

features.name: Safety Lights
features.detail: An integrated safety system, featuring a new bright 90-lumen headlamp with side amber lights and a brake-activated rear light powered by the internal battery, allows you to be seen at any time of day.

features.name: Turn Signals
features.detail: Alert drivers, riders, and people nearby with our turn signals. Simply use the left or right arrows on the button pad to turn on the blinkers on either side of the rear light.

features.name: Suspension Fork
features.detail: The front fork provides shock absorption for a smooth and comfortable ride. Adjust the tension or lock it out to tailor each ride to your preference based on payload capacity and weight distribution.

features.name: Folding Kickstand
features.detail: A heavy-duty steel side-sweeping kickstand located near the chainstay keeps the eBike upright.

features.name: Fenders
features.detail: Polypropylene fenders with a flared tail protect you and your ride from debris. The flexible material is damage-resistant and helps ensure long-term durability.

features.name: Quick-Release Pedals
features.detail: Custom-designed 6000 Series Aluminum quick-release pedals with splined inserts allow for easy, tool-free removal and installation. The new shape of the pedals improves foot traction for an optimal experience.

features.name: Lock-on Grips
features.detail: Full-length ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.

features.name: Saddle
features.detail: A custom-designed saddle complements a sporty look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.

features.name: Adjustable Handlebar Stem
features.detail: Ride longer and more comfortably in an upright cruising position with our new zero-degree stem, which shortens the handlebar reach. Plus, telescoping functionality allows riders to reach a wide range of heights while maintaining comfort and stability.

features.name: Telescoping Seat Post
features.detail: Customize the bike to your perfect size by adjusting the seat post height; simply open the quick-release collar and slide the post to your preferred height and lock it in place by closing the collar.

features.name: Fully Foldable
features.detail: A foldable hinge at both the handlebar stem and frame guarantees your ride will fit into virtually any compact space. Remove the pedals and the seat post in seconds for easy and lightweight transport.

features.name: Weight
features.detail: Total bike weight is 62lbs without the battery installed. The XP4 battery weighs 7lbs.

features.name: Easy Charging
features.detail: An auxiliary charging port near the bottom bracket provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XP4 comes standard with a 2amp charger for 4-6 hour charging, but a 5amp Fast Charger can be purchased separately, which can charge the standard battery in as little as 2 hours.

features.name: Fully Redesigned Frame
features.detail: The newly designed, more aesthetic XP4 frame is lightweight and features sturdy 6000 series aluminum with mounting points for various accessory combinations.

features.name: Motor Controller
features.detail: 20amp internal controller is IP-X5 rated and potted for weatherproofing and thermal management.

features.name: Green Packaging
features.detail: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.

features.name: Color
features.detail: Tempest Grey

features.name: One-Minute, Tool-Free Assembly
features.detail: Simply unfold the stem assembly, insert the stem & handlebars, and quickly attach the pedals and display screen.

features.name: Tested for Durability
features.detail: Our eBikes are built with industry-leading safety certifications so you can have peace of mind riding in almost any condition. A US-based bicycle testing lab put the XP4 through the rigorous ISO 4210 standard testing process.

features.name: Safety Certified
features.detail: We ensure that the electrical and battery components are manufactured to the industry standard. The Lectric XP4 is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the XP4's lithium-ion battery is certified to UL 2271.
