all.Thru Axle: The front wheel features a quick-release Thru Axle wheel attachment system for tool-free installation. This feature ensures a straight wheel, consistent brake rotor alignment, and handling stability.
all.Folding Capabilities: A foldable handlebar stem and adjustable seat height allows the XPedition to slide into compact spaces. Remove the pedals, seatpost, and front wheel in minutes for an easy and light-weight transport.
all.Weight: Total bike weight 65lbs without batteries installed. Each XPedition battery weighs 9lbs.
all.Charging: An external battery allows riders to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XPedition comes standard with a 2amp charger for 5-7 hour charging per battery but a 5amp Fast Charger can be purchased separately to speed up charging by 250%.
all.Hidden Cable Routing: A hollow top tube frame houses the main cables for a premium experience at no extra cost. Cables that may need to be serviced overtime are easily accessible and mounted to the underside of the frame.
all.Frame: The XPedition 2.0 frame is hydroformed to maximize strength to weight ratio. The lightweight and sturdy 6000 series aluminum features multiple mounting points throughout the eBike for various tool-free accessory combinations!
all.DIN Tested & Rated: A US-based bicycle testing lab put the XPedition through the rigorous DIN standard testing process to prove the frame and fork can handle a 450lb maximum payload ride after ride. The XPedition is rated to DIN 79010:2020-02.5.9.5.2.
all.Green Packaging: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.
all.One Minute, Tool-Free Assembly: Simply attach the quick-release pedals, unfold the handlebar stem, and install the front wheel via the quick-release thru axle.
all.Safety Certified: The Lectric XPedition 2.0 is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the XPedition's lithium-ion batteries are certified to UL 2271.

features.name: Pedal-Assist
features.detail: Five levels of pedal-assist and a throttle delivers the speed and power to own the road as a Class 1, 2, or 3 eBike.*

features.name: Thumb Throttle
features.detail: An ergonomic below-the-bar trigger throttle on the left hand side is easily engaged with your thumb while simultaneously eliminating joint fatigue.

features.name: Motor
features.detail: A 750W rear hub-motor (1310W Peak) with 85Nm of torque delivers power and speed quicker than ever before.

features.name: Motor Controller
features.detail: 24 amp externally mounted controller is IP-65 rated and potted for weather proofing and thermal management.

features.name: Battery
features.detail: Two removable 48V, 13Ah (combined 26Ah, 1248Wh) lithium-ion batteries certified to UL 2271 makes for a clean design while powering your ride for up to 120 miles on a single charge.** The XPedition is also certified to UL 2849.†

features.name: Smart-Draining Technology
features.detail: A dual-battery system coupled with a battery isolator will drain 2 batteries at the same time allowing you to stay at higher voltage longer & reach up to 170 miles, respectively.**

features.name: Rear Rack
features.detail: A long rear rack integrated into the bike frame holds up to 300lbs and features a specially designed bar for mounting various accessory combinations. The rear rack also has 2 bulit-in mounting windows to easily install childrens seats & more.

features.name: Suspension Front Fork
features.detail: The Courier 50 is a custom dual-spring suspension fork with up to 50mm of travel that provides shock absorption for a smooth and comfortable ride. Independent pre-load adjustments in each fork leg allow you to tailor each ride to your preference based on payload capacity and weight distribution.

features.name: LCD Display
features.detail: A backlit color LCD display with a USB-C port provides trip and battery intelligence on the go. IP-65 rated electrical components ensure greater water and dust resistance.

features.name: Tires
features.detail: Puncture-resistant 20” x 2.5” street tires make for a smoother ride with ease of control at hand. Slime is installed to prevent flat tires- at no additional cost.

features.name: Lectric PWR+™
features.detail: Lectric's new Pedal Assist Wattage Regulation+ (PWR+) programming allows for an improved Pedal Assist experience by assisting the rider up to a certain power level for each PAS setting. Learn more about PWR here.

features.name: PAS Torque Sensor
features.detail: A unique torque sensor combined with PWR+ technology, or Pedal Assist Wattage Regulation+, helps to manage power output based on the rider’s pedaling effort. With this technology, riders can reach higher speeds easily and with more control than ever before.

features.name: Drivetrain
features.detail: 11-32 tooth, 8-geared freewheel paired with a Shimano Altus derailleur and a thumb-triggered handlebar shifter allows you to swiftly change gears while riding to create pedaling efficiency and an easier riding experience at higher speeds.

features.name: Crankset
features.detail: Forged aluminum, 52-tooth chainring is the perfect ratio for effortless 20-inch wheel pedaling.

features.name: Chain
features.detail: A KMC Z8 steel chain paired with an idler pulley offers consistent tension and secure performance throughout your ride.

features.name: Brakes
features.detail: Ultimate stopping power with hydraulic mineral oil brakes paired with 180mm rotors (2.2mm thick) offers peace of mind in wet or dry conditions.

features.name: Safety Lights
features.detail: An integrated safety system, featuring a headlamp and a brake-activated rear light powered by the internal battery allows you to be seen at any time of day.

features.name: Turn Signals
features.detail: Alert drivers, riders, and people nearby by indicating which direction you are headed with our new turn signals. Simply use the left or right arrows on the display control pad to trigger a blinking cadence on one side of the rear light.

features.name: Folding Dual-Leg Kickstand
features.detail: A sturdy dual-leg kickstand with a 15+ inch spread located near the bottom bracket ensures the most balanced position for easy loading***. Pushing forward allows you to start riding without having to manually put the kickstand up with precious cargo.

features.name: Fenders
features.detail: Polypropolene Fenders protect you and your ride from debris. The rear fender features an integrated side-pane wheel shroud to shield cargo and passengers from the eBikes rotating components.

features.name: Removable Pedals
features.detail: Quick-release pedals easily detach from the bike for compact transport.

features.name: Lock-on Grips
features.detail: Ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.

features.name: Saddle
features.detail: A custom-designed saddle compliments a sporty look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.

features.name: Dual Seat Post
features.detail: An adjustable and removable seat post with two different expansion points allows riders to reach a wide range of heights while maintaining comfort and stability.

features.name: Adjustable Handlebar Stem
features.detail: Easily adjustable handlebar stem riser includes a quick-release lever to comfortably adjust your handlebar reach to your liking; bring your handlebars toward you or push them further back.

features.name: Thru Axle
features.detail: The front wheel features a quick-release Thru Axle wheel attachment system for tool-free installation. This feature ensures a straight wheel, consistent brake rotor alignment, and handling stability.

features.name: Folding Capabilities
features.detail: A foldable handlebar stem and adjustable seat height allows the XPedition to slide into compact spaces. Remove the pedals, seatpost, and front wheel in minutes for an easy and light-weight transport.

features.name: Weight
features.detail: Total bike weight 65lbs without batteries installed. Each XPedition battery weighs 9lbs.

features.name: Charging
features.detail: An external battery allows riders to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XPedition comes standard with a 2amp charger for 5-7 hour charging per battery but a 5amp Fast Charger can be purchased separately to speed up charging by 250%.

features.name: Hidden Cable Routing
features.detail: A hollow top tube frame houses the main cables for a premium experience at no extra cost. Cables that may need to be serviced overtime are easily accessible and mounted to the underside of the frame.

features.name: Frame
features.detail: The XPedition 2.0 frame is hydroformed to maximize strength to weight ratio. The lightweight and sturdy 6000 series aluminum features multiple mounting points throughout the eBike for various tool-free accessory combinations!

features.name: DIN Tested & Rated
features.detail: A US-based bicycle testing lab put the XPedition through the rigorous DIN standard testing process to prove the frame and fork can handle a 450lb maximum payload ride after ride. The XPedition is rated to DIN 79010:2020-02.5.9.5.2.

features.name: Green Packaging
features.detail: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.

features.name: Color
features.detail: Stratus White

features.name: One Minute, Tool-Free Assembly
features.detail: Simply attach the quick-release pedals, unfold the handlebar stem, and install the front wheel via the quick-release thru axle.

features.name: Safety Certified
features.detail: The Lectric XPedition 2.0 is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the XPedition's lithium-ion batteries are certified to UL 2271.

geometry.Payload Capacity: Max: 450 lbs. Never exceed the payload capacity. Distribute weight within the guidelines: Max Rider weight 330 lbs, Max Front Basket Weight 30 lbs, Max Rear Rack Weight 300 lbs.

features.name: Tires
features.detail: Puncture-resistant 20” x 2.5” street tires make for a smoother ride with ease of control at hand. Slime is installed to prevent flat tires- at no additional cost.

features.name: Lectric PWR+™
features.detail: Lectric's new Pedal Assist Wattage Regulation+ (PWR+) programming allows for an improved Pedal Assist experience by assisting the rider up to a certain power level for each PAS setting. Learn more about PWR here.

features.name: PAS Torque Sensor
features.detail: A unique torque sensor combined with PWR+ technology, or Pedal Assist Wattage Regulation+, helps to manage power output based on the rider’s pedaling effort. With this technology, riders can reach higher speeds easily and with more control than ever before.

features.name: Drivetrain
features.detail: 11-32 tooth, 8-geared freewheel paired with a Shimano Altus derailleur and a thumb-triggered handlebar shifter allows you to swiftly change gears while riding to create pedaling efficiency and an easier riding experience at higher speeds.

features.name: Crankset
features.detail: Forged aluminum, 52-tooth chainring is the perfect ratio for effortless 20-inch wheel pedaling.

features.name: Chain
features.detail: A KMC Z8 steel chain paired with an idler pulley offers consistent tension and secure performance throughout your ride.

features.name: Brakes
features.detail: Ultimate stopping power with hydraulic mineral oil brakes paired with 180mm rotors (2.2mm thick) offers peace of mind in wet or dry conditions.

features.name: Safety Lights
features.detail: An integrated safety system, featuring a headlamp and a brake-activated rear light powered by the internal battery allows you to be seen at any time of day.

features.name: Turn Signals
features.detail: Alert drivers, riders, and people nearby by indicating which direction you are headed with our new turn signals. Simply use the left or right arrows on the display control pad to trigger a blinking cadence on one side of the rear light.

features.name: Folding Dual-Leg Kickstand
features.detail: A sturdy dual-leg kickstand with a 15+ inch spread located near the bottom bracket ensures the most balanced position for easy loading***. Pushing forward allows you to start riding without having to manually put the kickstand up with precious cargo.

features.name: Fenders
features.detail: Polypropolene Fenders protect you and your ride from debris. The rear fender features an integrated side-pane wheel shroud to shield cargo and passengers from the eBikes rotating components.

features.name: Removable Pedals
features.detail: Quick-release pedals easily detach from the bike for compact transport.

features.name: Lock-on Grips
features.detail: Ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.

features.name: Saddle
features.detail: A custom-designed saddle compliments a sporty look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.

features.name: Dual Seat Post
features.detail: An adjustable and removable seat post with two different expansion points allows riders to reach a wide range of heights while maintaining comfort and stability.

features.name: Adjustable Handlebar Stem
features.detail: Easily adjustable handlebar stem riser includes a quick-release lever to comfortably adjust your handlebar reach to your liking; bring your handlebars toward you or push them further back.

features.name: Thru Axle
features.detail: The front wheel features a quick-release Thru Axle wheel attachment system for tool-free installation. This feature ensures a straight wheel, consistent brake rotor alignment, and handling stability.

features.name: Folding Capabilities
features.detail: A foldable handlebar stem and adjustable seat height allows the XPedition to slide into compact spaces. Remove the pedals, seatpost, and front wheel in minutes for an easy and light-weight transport.

features.name: Weight
features.detail: Total bike weight 65lbs without batteries installed. Each XPedition battery weighs 9lbs.

features.name: Charging
features.detail: An external battery allows riders to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XPedition comes standard with a 2amp charger for 7-9 hour charging per battery but a 5amp Fast Charger can be purchased separately to speed up charging by 250%.

features.name: Hidden Cable Routing
features.detail: A hollow top tube frame houses the main cables for a premium experience at no extra cost. Cables that may need to be serviced overtime are easily accessible and mounted to the underside of the frame.

features.name: Frame
features.detail: The XPedition 2.0 frame is hydroformed to maximize strength to weight ratio. The lightweight and sturdy 6000 series aluminum features multiple mounting points throughout the eBike for various tool-free accessory combinations!

features.name: DIN Tested & Rated
features.detail: A US-based bicycle testing lab put the XPedition through the rigorous DIN standard testing process to prove the frame and fork can handle a 450lb maximum payload ride after ride. The XPedition is rated to DIN 79010:2020-02.5.9.5.2.

features.name: Green Packaging
features.detail: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.

features.name: Color
features.detail: Stratus White

features.name: One Minute, Tool-Free Assembly
features.detail: Simply attach the quick-release pedals, unfold the handlebar stem, and install the front wheel via the quick-release thru axle.

features.name: Safety Certified
features.detail: The Lectric XPedition 2.0 is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the XPedition's lithium-ion batteries are certified to UL 2271.

general_info.pick_your_pedal_response_xperience_switc: Choose between responsive pedaling vs. standard pedaling with an easy adjustment to the settings, switching between a torque and cadence sensor. The torque sensor offers a more natural, smooth feel with intuitive power that responds to your pedal pressure. The cadence sensor provides power with each revolution of the pedals, making it a great option for beginners or anyone looking for a more relaxed ride.

ebike_system.thumb_throttle: An ergonomic below-the-bar trigger throttle on the left-hand side is easily engaged with your thumb while simultaneously eliminating joint fatigue.

stealth_m24_motor.details: A rear hub motor  with of supplies power and speed quicker than ever before. Stealth M24 technology delivers a quieter motor experience without sacrificing power

motor_controller.details: 24amp internal controller is IP-X5 rated and potted for weatherproofing and thermal management

ebike_system.semi_intergated_battery: A removable 48V, 14Ah (672Wh) lithium-ion battery certified to UL 2271, integrated on the down tube of the frame, makes for a clean and easily-accessible design while powering your ride for up to 60 miles on a single charge.*** The XPress2 is also certified to UL 2849.†

tft_lcd_display.details: A custom color TFT display featuring a detachable mount and a USB-C port provides trip, battery, power intelligence on the go. New intuitive drop-down menus make navigating the settings on your eBike easy to understand & allow users to customize their ride settings based on preference. The IP-X5-rated display ensures greater water resistance

ebike_system.torque_sensor: Our proprietary in-house-designed torque sensor programming will give you smoother power distribution and a better riding experience. It is designed to manage power output based on the rider’s pedaling effort. With this programming experience, riders can reach higher speeds easily and with more control than ever before.
ebike_system.easy_charging: An external charging port provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XPress2 comes standard with a 2amp charger for 5-7 hour charging, but a 5amp Fast Charger can be purchased separately, which can charge the long-range battery in less than 3 hours.

special_features.5_riding_modes: Five riding modes deliver the speed and power to own the road as a Class 1, 2, or 3 eBike.* New simplified labels, including Eco, Tour, Sport, Sport+, & Turbo, allow riders to choose their riding experience.
special_features.keyless_riding: Turn your bike on and off with the push of a button, and start riding without having the key in the battery! Keys are needed to remove the battery from the bike frame only.

safety.safety_lights: An integrated safety system, featuring a new bright 90-lumen headlamp with side amber lights and a brake-activated rear light powered by the internal battery, allows you to be seen at any time of day.
safety.turn_signals: Alert drivers, riders, and people nearby with our turn signals. Simply use the left or right arrows on the button pad to turn on the blinkers on either side of the rear light.

certifications.safety_certified: We ensure that the electrical and battery components are manufactured to the industry standard. The Lectric XPress2 is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the XPress2's lithium-ion battery is certified to UL 2271.

suspension_front_fork.details: The XPress2 features a best-in-class XCM 32 suspension fork with up to, providing shock absorption for a smooth ride

frameset.frame: The XPress is available in 2 different frame styles; a diamond High-Step and an easy-on Step-Thru.

drivetrain.drivetrain: An 11-32 tooth, 8-speed freewheel paired with a Shimano Altus derailleur and a below-the-bar trigger shifter allows you to swiftly change gears while riding to create pedaling efficiency and an easier riding experience at higher speeds.

crankset.details: Forged aluminum, 46-tooth custom chainring is the perfect ratio for effortless 27.5-inch wheel pedaling

chain.details: A Z8 steel chain with inner plate chamfering offers consistent tension and smooth transitions between shifting for a secure performance throughout your ride

drivetrain.quick_release_pedals: Custom-designed 6000 Series Aluminum quick-release pedals with splined inserts allow for easy, tool-free removal and installation. The new shape of the pedals improves foot traction for an optimal experience.

602_hydraulic_brakes.details: Get ultimate stopping power with 602 hydraulic brakes paired with rotors (2.3mm thick), making it as easy to stop as it is to go, whether in wet or dry conditions. Paired with ergonomically designed aluminum brake levers for durability

tires_with_slime.details: Puncture-resistant 27.5” x 2.1” slick tires can handle any commute with ease. The sidewall features reflective strips for better visibility at night. Slime is installed to prevent flat tires—at no additional cost

wheelset.thru_axle: The front wheel features a specially designed, ultra-fast thru-axle attachment system for quick, tool-free installation. This design helps ensure precise wheel alignment, consistent brake rotor positioning, and stable handling. Remove the wheel in minutes for easier, more lightweight transport.

cockpit.telescoping_seat_post: Customize the bike to your perfect size by adjusting the seat post height; simply open the quick-release collar and slide the post to your preferred height and lock it in place by closing the collar.
cockpit.comfort_curve_handlebars: The XPress2 Step-Thru Cruiser features curved handlebars paired with an adjustable stem riser and quick-release lever, allowing riders to easily customize handlebar reach and positioning for a more comfortable, upright riding experience.
cockpit.lock_on_grips: Full-length ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.
cockpit.saddle: A custom-designed saddle complements a sporty look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.
cockpit.hybrid_sprint_handlebars: The XPress2 High-Step Commuter features sporty Hybrid Sprint™ handlebars with a fixed stem, creating a more athletic, active riding position for confident handling and responsive control. Designed for riders who prefer a performance-inspired feel, the setup delivers a sleek, streamlined look while maintaining the durability and low-maintenance simplicity of a classic commuter bike.

general_other.tested_for_durability: Our eBikes are built with industry-leading safety certifications so you can have peace of mind riding in almost any condition. A US-based bicycle testing lab put the XPress2 through the rigorous ISO 4210 standard testing process.

geometry.payload_capacity: Max: 330 lbs. Never exceed the payload capacity. Distribute weight within the guidelines: Max Rider weight 330 lbs, Max Rear Rack Weight 30 lbs.

free_accessories.name: Safety Lights
free_accessories.detail: An integrated safety system, featuring a new bright 90-lumen headlamp with side amber lights and a brake-activated rear light powered by the internal battery, allows you to be seen at any time of day.

geometry.Payload Capacity: Max: 330 lbs. Never exceed the payload capacity. Distribute weight within the guidelines: Max Rider weight 330 lbs, Max Rear Rack Weight 30 lbs.

physical.Tires—with Slime!: Puncture-resistant 27.5” x 2.1” slick tires can handle any commute with ease. The sidewall features reflective strips for better visibility at night. Slime is installed to prevent flat tires—at no additional cost.
physical.Pick your Pedal Response; XPerience Swit: Choose between responsive pedaling vs. standard pedaling with an easy adjustment to the settings, switching between a torque and cadence sensor. The torque sensor offers a more natural, smooth feel with intuitive power that responds to your pedal pressure. The cadence sensor provides power with each revolution of the pedals, making it a great option for beginners or anyone looking for a more relaxed ride.
physical.Suspension Front Fork: The XPress2 features a best-in-class SR SunTour XCM 32 suspension fork with up to 80mm of travel, providing shock absorption for a smooth ride.
physical.Drivetrain: An 11-32 tooth, 8-speed freewheel paired with a Shimano Altus derailleur and a below-the-bar trigger shifter allows you to swiftly change gears while riding to create pedaling efficiency and an easier riding experience at higher speeds.
physical.Crankset: Forged aluminum, 46-tooth custom chainring is the perfect ratio for effortless 27.5-inch wheel pedaling.
physical.Chain: A KMC Z8 steel chain with inner plate chamfering offers consistent tension and smooth transitions between shifting for a secure performance throughout your ride.
physical.602 Hydraulic Brakes: Get ultimate stopping power with 602 hydraulic brakes paired with 180mm rotors (2.3mm thick), making it as easy to stop as it is to go, whether in wet or dry conditions. Paired with ergonomically designed aluminum brake levers for durability.
physical.Safety Lights: An integrated safety system, featuring a new bright 90-lumen headlamp with side amber lights and a brake-activated rear light powered by the internal battery, allows you to be seen at any time of day.
physical.Turn Signals: Alert drivers, riders, and people nearby with our turn signals. Simply use the left or right arrows on the button pad to turn on the blinkers on either side of the rear light.
physical.Telescoping Seat Post: Customize the bike to your perfect size by adjusting the seat post height; simply open the quick-release collar and slide the post to your preferred height and lock it in place by closing the collar.
physical.Comfort Curve™ Handlebars: The XPress2 Step-Thru Cruiser features curved handlebars paired with an adjustable stem riser and quick-release lever, allowing riders to easily customize handlebar reach and positioning for a more comfortable, upright riding experience.
physical.Thru Axle: The front wheel features a specially designed, ultra-fast thru-axle attachment system for quick, tool-free installation. This design helps ensure precise wheel alignment, consistent brake rotor positioning, and stable handling. Remove the wheel in minutes for easier, more lightweight transport.
physical.Quick-Release Pedals: Custom-designed 6000 Series Aluminum quick-release pedals with splined inserts allow for easy, tool-free removal and installation. The new shape of the pedals improves foot traction for an optimal experience.
physical.Lock-on Grips: Full-length ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.
physical.Saddle: A custom-designed saddle complements a sporty look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.
physical.Folding Kickstand: A heavy-duty steel side-sweeping kickstand located near the chainstay keeps the eBike upright.
physical.Hidden Cable Routing: The down tube of the frame houses the main cables for a premium experience at no extra cost.
physical.Frame: The XPress is available in 2 different frame styles; a diamond High-Step and an easy-on Step-Thru.
physical.Bike Weight: Total bike weight is 60lbs with the 6lb battery removed.
physical.Green Packaging: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.
physical.One Minute, Tool-Free Assembly: Simply attach the quick-release pedals and install the front wheel via the thru axle.
physical.Tested for Durability: Our eBikes are built with industry-leading safety certifications so you can have peace of mind riding in almost any condition. A US-based bicycle testing lab put the XPress2 through the rigorous ISO 4210 standard testing process.
physical.Safety Certified: We ensure that the electrical and battery components are manufactured to the industry standard. The Lectric XPress2 is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the XPress2's lithium-ion battery is certified to UL 2271.

technical.5 Riding Modes: Five riding modes deliver the speed and power to own the road as a Class 1, 2, or 3 eBike.* New simplified labels, including Eco, Tour, Sport, Sport+, & Turbo, allow riders to choose their riding experience.
technical.Thumb Throttle: An ergonomic below-the-bar trigger throttle on the left-hand side is easily engaged with your thumb while simultaneously eliminating joint fatigue.
technical.Stealth M24 Motor: A 750W rear hub motor (1310W peak) with 85Nm of torque supplies power and speed quicker than ever before. Stealth M24 technology delivers a quieter motor experience without sacrificing power.
technical.Motor Controller: 24amp internal controller is IP-X5 rated and potted for weatherproofing and thermal management.
technical.Semi-Intergated Battery: A removable 48V, 14Ah (672Wh) lithium-ion battery certified to UL 2271, integrated on the down tube of the frame, makes for a clean and easily-accessible design while powering your ride for up to 60 miles on a single charge.*** The XPress2 is also certified to UL 2849.†
technical.Keyless Riding: Turn your bike on and off with the push of a button, and start riding without having the key in the battery! Keys are needed to remove the battery from the bike frame only.
technical.TFT LCD Display: A custom color TFT display featuring a detachable mount and a USB-C port provides trip, battery, & power intelligence on the go. New intuitive drop-down menus make navigating the settings on your eBike easy to understand & allow users to customize their ride settings based on preference. The IP-X5-rated display ensures greater water resistance.
technical.Torque Sensor: Our proprietary in-house-designed torque sensor programming will give you smoother power distribution and a better riding experience. It is designed to manage power output based on the rider’s pedaling effort. With this programming experience, riders can reach higher speeds easily and with more control than ever before.
technical.Easy Charging: An external charging port provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XPress2 comes standard with a 2amp charger for 5-7 hour charging, but a 5amp Fast Charger can be purchased separately, which can charge the long-range battery in less than 3 hours.

features.name: 5 Riding Modes
features.detail: Five riding modes deliver the speed and power to own the road as a Class 1, 2, or 3 eBike.* New simplified labels, including Eco, Tour, Sport, Sport+, & Turbo, allow riders to choose their riding experience.

features.name: Thumb Throttle
features.detail: An ergonomic below-the-bar trigger throttle on the left-hand side is easily engaged with your thumb while simultaneously eliminating joint fatigue.

features.name: Stealth M24 Motor
features.detail: A 750W rear hub motor (1310W peak) with 85Nm of torque supplies power and speed quicker than ever before. Stealth M24 technology delivers a quieter motor experience without sacrificing power.

features.name: Motor Controller
features.detail: 24amp internal controller is IP-X5 rated and potted for weatherproofing and thermal management.

features.name: Semi-Intergated Battery
features.detail: A removable 48V, 14Ah (672Wh) lithium-ion battery certified to UL 2271, integrated on the down tube of the frame, makes for a clean and easily-accessible design while powering your ride for up to 60 miles on a single charge.*** The XPress2 is also certified to UL 2849.†

features.name: Keyless Riding
features.detail: Turn your bike on and off with the push of a button, and start riding without having the key in the battery! Keys are needed to remove the battery from the bike frame only.

features.name: TFT LCD Display
features.detail: A custom color TFT display featuring a detachable mount and a USB-C port provides trip, battery, & power intelligence on the go. New intuitive drop-down menus make navigating the settings on your eBike easy to understand & allow users to customize their ride settings based on preference. The IP-X5-rated display ensures greater water resistance.

features.name: Tires—with Slime!
features.detail: Puncture-resistant 27.5” x 2.1” slick tires can handle any commute with ease. The sidewall features reflective strips for better visibility at night. Slime is installed to prevent flat tires—at no additional cost.

features.name: Torque Sensor
features.detail: Our proprietary in-house-designed torque sensor programming will give you smoother power distribution and a better riding experience. It is designed to manage power output based on the rider’s pedaling effort. With this programming experience, riders can reach higher speeds easily and with more control than ever before.

features.name: Pick your Pedal Response; XPerience Switch™
features.detail: Choose between responsive pedaling vs. standard pedaling with an easy adjustment to the settings, switching between a torque and cadence sensor. The torque sensor offers a more natural, smooth feel with intuitive power that responds to your pedal pressure. The cadence sensor provides power with each revolution of the pedals, making it a great option for beginners or anyone looking for a more relaxed ride.

features.name: Suspension Front Fork
features.detail: The XPress2 features a best-in-class SR SunTour XCM 32 suspension fork with up to 80mm of travel, providing shock absorption for a smooth ride.

features.name: Drivetrain
features.detail: An 11-32 tooth, 8-speed freewheel paired with a Shimano Altus derailleur and a below-the-bar trigger shifter allows you to swiftly change gears while riding to create pedaling efficiency and an easier riding experience at higher speeds.

features.name: Crankset
features.detail: Forged aluminum, 46-tooth custom chainring is the perfect ratio for effortless 27.5-inch wheel pedaling.

features.name: Chain
features.detail: A KMC Z8 steel chain with inner plate chamfering offers consistent tension and smooth transitions between shifting for a secure performance throughout your ride.

features.name: 602 Hydraulic Brakes
features.detail: Get ultimate stopping power with 602 hydraulic brakes paired with 180mm rotors (2.3mm thick), making it as easy to stop as it is to go, whether in wet or dry conditions. Paired with ergonomically designed aluminum brake levers for durability.

features.name: Safety Lights
features.detail: An integrated safety system, featuring a new bright 90-lumen headlamp with side amber lights and a brake-activated rear light powered by the internal battery, allows you to be seen at any time of day.

features.name: Turn Signals
features.detail: Alert drivers, riders, and people nearby with our turn signals. Simply use the left or right arrows on the button pad to turn on the blinkers on either side of the rear light.

features.name: Easy Charging
features.detail: An external charging port provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XPress2 comes standard with a 2amp charger for 5-7 hour charging, but a 5amp Fast Charger can be purchased separately, which can charge the long-range battery in less than 3 hours.

features.name: Telescoping Seat Post
features.detail: Customize the bike to your perfect size by adjusting the seat post height; simply open the quick-release collar and slide the post to your preferred height and lock it in place by closing the collar.

features.name: Comfort Curve™ Handlebars
features.detail: The XPress2 Step-Thru Cruiser features curved handlebars paired with an adjustable stem riser and quick-release lever, allowing riders to easily customize handlebar reach and positioning for a more comfortable, upright riding experience.

features.name: Thru Axle
features.detail: The front wheel features a specially designed, ultra-fast thru-axle attachment system for quick, tool-free installation. This design helps ensure precise wheel alignment, consistent brake rotor positioning, and stable handling. Remove the wheel in minutes for easier, more lightweight transport.

features.name: Quick-Release Pedals
features.detail: Custom-designed 6000 Series Aluminum quick-release pedals with splined inserts allow for easy, tool-free removal and installation. The new shape of the pedals improves foot traction for an optimal experience.

features.name: Lock-on Grips
features.detail: Full-length ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.

features.name: Saddle
features.detail: A custom-designed saddle complements a sporty look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.

features.name: Folding Kickstand
features.detail: A heavy-duty steel side-sweeping kickstand located near the chainstay keeps the eBike upright.

features.name: Hidden Cable Routing
features.detail: The down tube of the frame houses the main cables for a premium experience at no extra cost.

features.name: Frame
features.detail: The XPress is available in 2 different frame styles; a diamond High-Step and an easy-on Step-Thru.

features.name: Bike Weight
features.detail: Total bike weight is 60lbs with the 6lb battery removed.

features.name: Green Packaging
features.detail: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.

features.name: One Minute, Tool-Free Assembly
features.detail: Simply attach the quick-release pedals and install the front wheel via the thru axle.

features.name: Tested for Durability
features.detail: Our eBikes are built with industry-leading safety certifications so you can have peace of mind riding in almost any condition. A US-based bicycle testing lab put the XPress2 through the rigorous ISO 4210 standard testing process.

features.name: Safety Certified
features.detail: We ensure that the electrical and battery components are manufactured to the industry standard. The Lectric XPress2 is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the XPress2's lithium-ion battery is certified to UL 2271.

all.Quick-Release Pedals: Custom-designed 6000 Series Aluminum quick-release pedals with splined inserts allow for easy, tool-free removal and installation. The new shape of the pedals improves foot traction for an optimal experience.
all.Lock-on Grips: Full-length ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.
all.Saddle: A custom-designed saddle complements a sporty look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.
all.Folding Kickstand: A heavy-duty steel side-sweeping kickstand located near the chainstay keeps the eBike upright.
all.Hidden Cable Routing: The down tube of the frame houses the main cables for a premium experience at no extra cost.
all.Frame: The XPress is available in 2 different frame styles; a diamond High-Step and an easy-on Step-Thru.
all.Bike Weight: Total bike weight is 60lbs with the 6lb battery removed.
all.Green Packaging: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.
all.One Minute, Tool-Free Assembly: Simply attach the quick-release pedals and install the front wheel via the thru axle.
all.Tested for Durability: Our eBikes are built with industry-leading safety certifications so you can have peace of mind riding in almost any condition. A US-based bicycle testing lab put the XPress2 through the rigorous ISO 4210 standard testing process.
all.Safety Certified: We ensure that the electrical and battery components are manufactured to the industry standard. The Lectric XPress2 is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the XPress2's lithium-ion battery is certified to UL 2271.

features.name: 5 Riding Modes
features.detail: Five riding modes deliver the speed and power to own the road as a Class 1, 2, or 3 eBike.* New simplified labels, including Eco, Tour, Sport, Sport+, & Turbo, allow riders to choose their riding experience.

features.name: Thumb Throttle
features.detail: An ergonomic below-the-bar trigger throttle on the left-hand side is easily engaged with your thumb while simultaneously eliminating joint fatigue.

features.name: Stealth M24 Motor
features.detail: A 750W rear hub motor (1310W peak) with 85Nm of torque supplies power and speed quicker than ever before. Stealth M24 technology delivers a quieter motor experience without sacrificing power.

features.name: Motor Controller
features.detail: 24amp internal controller is IP-X5 rated and potted for weatherproofing and thermal management.

features.name: Semi-Intergated Battery
features.detail: A removable 48V, 14Ah (672Wh) lithium-ion battery certified to UL 2271, integrated on the down tube of the frame, makes for a clean and easily-accessible design while powering your ride for up to 60 miles on a single charge.*** The XPress2 is also certified to UL 2849.†

features.name: Keyless Riding
features.detail: Turn your bike on and off with the push of a button, and start riding without having the key in the battery! Keys are needed to remove the battery from the bike frame only.

features.name: TFT LCD Display
features.detail: A custom color TFT display featuring a detachable mount and a USB-C port provides trip, battery, & power intelligence on the go. New intuitive drop-down menus make navigating the settings on your eBike easy to understand & allow users to customize their ride settings based on preference. The IP-X5-rated display ensures greater water resistance.

features.name: Tires—with Slime!
features.detail: Puncture-resistant 27.5” x 2.1” slick tires can handle any commute with ease. The sidewall features reflective strips for better visibility at night. Slime is installed to prevent flat tires—at no additional cost.

features.name: Torque Sensor
features.detail: Our proprietary in-house-designed torque sensor programming will give you smoother power distribution and a better riding experience. It is designed to manage power output based on the rider’s pedaling effort. With this programming experience, riders can reach higher speeds easily and with more control than ever before.

features.name: Pick your Pedal Response; XPerience Switch™
features.detail: Choose between responsive pedaling vs. standard pedaling with an easy adjustment to the settings, switching between a torque and cadence sensor. The torque sensor offers a more natural, smooth feel with intuitive power that responds to your pedal pressure. The cadence sensor provides power with each revolution of the pedals, making it a great option for beginners or anyone looking for a more relaxed ride.

features.name: Suspension Front Fork
features.detail: The XPress2 features a best-in-class SR SunTour XCM 32 suspension fork with up to 80mm of travel, providing shock absorption for a smooth ride.

features.name: Drivetrain
features.detail: An 11-32 tooth, 8-speed freewheel paired with a Shimano Altus derailleur and a below-the-bar trigger shifter allows you to swiftly change gears while riding to create pedaling efficiency and an easier riding experience at higher speeds.

features.name: Crankset
features.detail: Forged aluminum, 46-tooth custom chainring is the perfect ratio for effortless 27.5-inch wheel pedaling.

features.name: Chain
features.detail: A KMC Z8 steel chain with inner plate chamfering offers consistent tension and smooth transitions between shifting for a secure performance throughout your ride.

features.name: 602 Hydraulic Brakes
features.detail: Get ultimate stopping power with 602 hydraulic brakes paired with 180mm rotors (2.3mm thick), making it as easy to stop as it is to go, whether in wet or dry conditions. Paired with ergonomically designed aluminum brake levers for durability.

features.name: Safety Lights
features.detail: An integrated safety system, featuring a new bright 90-lumen headlamp with side amber lights and a brake-activated rear light powered by the internal battery, allows you to be seen at any time of day.

features.name: Turn Signals
features.detail: Alert drivers, riders, and people nearby with our turn signals. Simply use the left or right arrows on the button pad to turn on the blinkers on either side of the rear light.

features.name: Easy Charging
features.detail: An external charging port provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XPress2 comes standard with a 2amp charger for 5-7 hour charging, but a 5amp Fast Charger can be purchased separately, which can charge the long-range battery in less than 3 hours.

features.name: Telescoping Seat Post
features.detail: Customize the bike to your perfect size by adjusting the seat post height; simply open the quick-release collar and slide the post to your preferred height and lock it in place by closing the collar.

features.name: Hybrid Sprint™ Handlebars
features.detail: The XPress2 High-Step Commuter features sporty Hybrid Sprint™ handlebars with a fixed stem, creating a more athletic, active riding position for confident handling and responsive control. Designed for riders who prefer a performance-inspired feel, the setup delivers a sleek, streamlined look while maintaining the durability and low-maintenance simplicity of a classic commuter bike.

features.name: Thru Axle
features.detail: The front wheel features a specially designed, ultra-fast thru-axle attachment system for quick, tool-free installation. This design helps ensure precise wheel alignment, consistent brake rotor positioning, and stable handling. Remove the wheel in minutes for easier, more lightweight transport.

features.name: Quick-Release Pedals
features.detail: Custom-designed 6000 Series Aluminum quick-release pedals with splined inserts allow for easy, tool-free removal and installation. The new shape of the pedals improves foot traction for an optimal experience.

features.name: Lock-on Grips
features.detail: Full-length ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.

features.name: Saddle
features.detail: A custom-designed saddle complements a sporty look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.

features.name: Folding Kickstand
features.detail: A heavy-duty steel side-sweeping kickstand located near the chainstay keeps the eBike upright.

features.name: Hidden Cable Routing
features.detail: The down tube of the frame houses the main cables for a premium experience at no extra cost.

features.name: Frame
features.detail: The XPress is available in 2 different frame styles; a diamond High-Step and an easy-on Step-Thru.

features.name: Bike Weight
features.detail: Total bike weight is 60lbs with the 6lb battery removed.

features.name: Green Packaging
features.detail: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.

features.name: One Minute, Tool-Free Assembly
features.detail: Simply attach the quick-release pedals and install the front wheel via the thru axle.

features.name: Tested for Durability
features.detail: Our eBikes are built with industry-leading safety certifications so you can have peace of mind riding in almost any condition. A US-based bicycle testing lab put the XPress2 through the rigorous ISO 4210 standard testing process.

features.name: Safety Certified
features.detail: We ensure that the electrical and battery components are manufactured to the industry standard. The Lectric XPress2 is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the XPress2's lithium-ion battery is certified to UL 2271.
